---
pagetitle: "Ziang Liu"
image: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/50853393?s=96&v=4
email-obfuscation: javascript
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.hero}

<img class="hero-avatar" src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/50853393?s=240&v=4" alt="Ziang Liu">

::: {.hero-content}

[Ziang Liu]{.hero-name}

[Associate Professor, Ph.D.]{.hero-role}

::: {.hero-affil}
[Department of Industrial and Systems Engineering](https://ise-hp.ws.hosei.ac.jp/), [Hosei University](https://www.hosei.ac.jp/)
:::

::: {.hero-links}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=dRuC1OoAAAAJ&hl){.hero-link}
[<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/zi-ang-liu){.hero-link}
[<i class="bi bi-caret-right-fill"></i> researchmap](https://researchmap.jp/liu.ziang){.profile-link}
:::

:::

:::

::: {.info-grid}

::: {.info-card}
[<i class="bi bi-people-fill"></i> Intelligent Systems Laboratory]{.info-card-title}

Our Laboratory researches operations research, machine learning, and optimization methods to improve decision-making for complex systems. 

[Visit the lab](https://isl-hosei.github.io/){.info-link} · [Join us](https://isl-hosei.github.io/join.html){.info-link}
:::

::: {.info-card}
[<i class="bi bi-geo-alt-fill"></i> Contact]{.info-card-title}

Hosei University,\
3-7-2 Kajino-cho, \ 
Koganei-shi,\
Tokyo 184-8584, Japan

[liu@hosei.ac.jp](mailto:liu@hosei.ac.jp){.info-link} · [Map](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Hosei+University+Koganei+Campus){.info-link}
:::

:::
